name: Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine popped popcorn and peanuts in a large roasting pan; keep warm in a 300 oven while preparing the caramel sauce.
2. In a heavy, 2-quart saucepan, combine brown sugar, butter, corn syrup, and salt. Heat over medium until boiling, stirring almost constantly.
3. Boil gently, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes over the entire surface of the mixture.
4. Remove from heat; stir in baking soda.
5. Pour the caramel sauce evenly over the popcorn and peanuts in the roasting pan.
6. Stir well to coat everything thoroughly.
7. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 20 minutes, stirring once after 15 minutes.
8. Immediately spread the mixture out on a large piece of foil; allow it to cool completely.
9. Break into clusters and store tightly covered in an airtight container. Makes about 11 cups.
